annotations.summary: Laptop integration smoke test — synthetic 5xx surge
annotations.description: This alert was injected manually via curl to validate the AI-stack pipeline end-to-end on a laptop GPU. Expected behavior: triage fans out to the 5 MCPs (some may return errors if monitoring VM is unreachable), Ollama (qwen2.5:7b) produces a structured verdict, decision lands in the SQLite store at /data/rca_history.db, visible at http://localhost:8090/dashboard and via GET /decisions.
